faqs.question: Why is fly control important for Clinton Hill homes and businesses?
faqs.answer: Flies spread disease-causing bacteria and contaminate food surfaces in homes and businesses. In Clinton Hill's dense residential areas and busy restaurant corridors, flies can quickly become a health hazard and nuisance. Professional fly control eliminates breeding sites, reduces populations, and prevents future infestations.
